title: Sodium Hydroxide(NaOH)
description: This modpack collects the best preformance and QOL mods into one modpack, all required libraries are included
body:
This modpack collects the best preformance and quality of live mods that do not negatively affect preformance, use [the modrinth modpack installer tool](https://jamie.codeberg.page/mrpack-to-zip/@master/) to install it if you don't use the modrinth app, Most mods here are client side only but some require having them installed on the server side as well if you are playing on a server, playing on single player is completely find and you don't need to do anything but install the modpack.

the purpose of this mod pack is to easily install all the necessary performance and quality of life mods to enhance your Minecraft experience, all the mods are compatible with each other and the required libraries are also included which means all you have to do is install the modpack and play!

This modpack has the follwing:

1. Apple skin:gives you visual saturation on your hunger bar
2. Better Statistics Screen: gives you a clean user freindly Statistics Screen 
3. BetterArmorHUD: gives visual representation of your armor peices, their knockback value, and the toughness value
4. CIT Resewn:Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs
5. Chest Tracker: allows you to search for any item in any container you ever opened
6. Cloth Config API:Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods
7. Clumps: clumps xp orbs to reduce lag
8. Concurrent Chunk Management Engine:allows for faster chunk generation
9. Continuity:adds connected texture support
10. Data Loader:adds a folder called "datapacks" to your .minecraft folder, any datapacks placed in that folder will automaticlly be applied to any world you create and join
11. Enhanced Block Entities:Reduce block entity FPS lag with almost no compromises, and improve their visuals
12. Entity Culling:hides entities that are not visible, thus reducing lag
13. Fabric API:a very important support mod
14. Fabric Language Kotlin:This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods.
15. Fast Minecart: makes minecarts twice as fast, Yippe!
16. FastQuit:allows you to quit the world instantly, it will be saved in the backround after you quit it
17. FerriteCore:This mod reduces the memory usage of Minecraft in a few different ways, read [This](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) if you are intrested in the technical details
18. Gamma Utils (Fullbright): allows you to control the gama value and use nightvision if you are using shaders that dont allow for gamma useage
19. ImmediatelyFast:Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft
20. Indium:Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo
21. Inventory Profiles Next: adds a punch of diffrent inventory tweaks, read [This](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) for more info
22. Iris Shaders:adds support for shaders
23. Language Reload:Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages
24. Litematica: allows you to load build schematics
25. MaLiLib:support mod
26. Main Menu Credits:support mod
27. MixinTrace:Adds a list of mixins in the stack trace to crash reports
28. More Chat History: you should be able to guess what this one does
29. Noisium:Optimises worldgen performance
30. OptiGUI:custom GUI textures on Fabric and Quilt with built-in OptiFine custom GUI resource pack support
31. Paginated Advancements & Custom Frames:Better advancements screen
32. Puzzle:Adds resourcepack features and a GUI to configure OptiFine alternatives more conveniently.
33. Reese's Sodium Options:Alternative Options Menu for Sodium
34. ReplayMod:allows you to record the game and reply it in small format files
35. Resourcify:allows you to install all diffrent kinds of pack in-game
36. Sodium:da goat of optimization 
37. ScalableLux:A Fabric mod based on Starlight that improves the performance of light updates in Minecraft.
38. Sodium Extra:A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
39. TCDCommons API:support mod
40. Trade Cycling:allows you to cycle villager trades with a single click
41. Tweakeroo: adds sooo much tweaks just read [This](https://modrinth.com/mod/tweakeroo)
42. YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL) support mod
43. Zoomify: adds zoom
44. [EMF] Entity Model Features: adds Entity Model Features support 
45. [ETF] Entity Texture Features: adds  Entity Texture Features support
46. e4mc:allows you to share your lan address without port forwarding and without sharing your IP
47. libIPN:support mod
48. Lithium:Lithium is a modern, general-purpose optimization mod for Minecraft which works to improve a number of systems (game physics, mob AI, block ticking, etc) with the goal of not changing any vanilla mechanics.
49. Krypton:A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack
50. controlling:allows you to search keybinds and manage them easily
51. capes:Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods
52. easy anvils:allows items to stay inside the anvil and displays them, removes the "too expensive" xp limit message, allows you to rename items for free and you can rename nametags without an anvil
53. easy magic:allows items to stay inside the enchanting table and displays them, allows you to read the enchantment that you will be getting, and allows you to recycle enchantments by paying xp and lapis
54. forge api: support mod
55. Puzzles Lib:support mod
